mapper.sql: SELECT T.DWDM SJDM, T.DEPT_ID AS XJDM, T.DEPT_ID AS deptId, COUNT(T.DJXH) BS, COUNT(DISTINCT T.DJXH) HS, SUM(T.YBTSE) YBTSE, SUM(T.JCGHJE) JCGHJE, SUM(T.HYGHJE) HYGHJE, SUM(T.SDGHJE) SDGHJE, SUM(T.CBJJE) CBJJE, SUM(T.XJGHJE) XJGHJE, SUM(T.SJGHJE) SJGHJE, SUM(T.SZGHJE) SZGHJE, SUM(T.QGGHJE) QGGHJE, SUM(T.SWJGJE) SWJGJE, SUM(T.SDSJE) SDSJE FROM szjfcx T
mapper.select:
1=1 and `SPUUID` NOT IN ( '9E9224DA4801B9C0F2E750B0F331B658', '1A59022355C1DE8A99ECC72ABA4F73BF', '2C5503CB48B135A193D1C86DC8ED2FBE', '4A19928B0A7B8230730BF3EB1AD70743', '30FB4B3B6A65F4E9EEBE89861E115EAD', '82734748BC80AEAA879EE8D195D30726', '2025CCE085A39457C42135A7137CA719', '53B68C60EFA87234DA01EBA8B9249BA7', '16F9FF83CD0B7B6E075EDCA62126CDE5', '917C47DA338B81CA80BAFE81300BE16C' ) and DJXH = #{req.djxh} and SHXYDM = #{req.shxydm} and NSRMC like concat('%', #{req.nsrmc}, '%') and (DWDM = #{req.deptId} or DEPT_ID = #{req.deptId}) and ZSPM_DM = #{req.zspmDm}
GROUP BY T.DWDM,T.DEPT_ID
